generated_oml:
// Process: SysML Requirement Modeling
instance SysMLModelComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects system requirements, functions, and logical structure using SysML v1.7 for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SysMLModelDataTransmitted
]

instance SysMLModelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SysMLModelComponent
]

instance SysMLModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SysML model capturing requirements, functions, logical architecture, and product/technical layers."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SysMLModelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML editor environment used to create and maintain SysML models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelBuildingService
]

instance SysMLModelBuildingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that constructs a comprehensive system architecture from SysML models."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the completeness and consistency of the SysML model, supporting validation against RFLP."
]

// Process: MontiArc Component-Connector Architecture
instance MontiArcComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Defines component-connector architecture using MontiArc."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MontiArcDataTransmitted
]

instance MontiArcDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MontiArcComponent
]

instance MontiArcData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture model capturing components, connectors, and interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MontiArcDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc modeling environment for component-connector design."
    DTDFVocab:enables MontiArcModelingService
]

instance MontiArcModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that builds and validates the component-connector architecture."
    DTDFVocab:provides MontiArcModelInsight
]

instance MontiArcModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the component-connector structure and interface compliance."
]

// Process: Simulink Dynamic Simulation
instance SimulinkComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Executes system behavior simulation using MathWorks Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulinkDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkComponent
]

instance SimulinkData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation output data capturing system dynamic response during validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulatorEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Matlab/Simulink simulation environment."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkSimulationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs dynamic simulations and provides simulation-derived insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulinkSimulationInsight
]

instance SimulinkSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into system behavior over time generated from simulation data."
]

// Process: Code Generation for C++/Java
instance CodeGenComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component responsible for generating executable C++ or Java code from validated models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CodeGenDataTransmitted
]

instance CodeGenDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CodeGenComponent
]

instance CodeGenData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Executable code artifact generated from validated models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CodeGenDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGenEnabler
]

instance CodeGenEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Code generation environment or toolchain for generating C++ or Java."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

instance CodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that transforms validated models into executable code."
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateExecutableCodeAction
]

instance GenerateExecutableCodeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action that triggers code generation from the model."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Process: Digital Shadow Reference Model
instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital shadow reference model providing contextual data traces and abstraction mechanisms for the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalShadowEnabler
]

instance DigitalShadowEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that aggregates contextual data traces from physical and virtual sources."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowProcessingService
]

instance DigitalShadowProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that processes and abstracts data for digital twin analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides DigitalShadowInsight
]

instance DigitalShadowInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into system state by comparing real-world data with the digital mirror."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle is organized following a multi‑layered MBSE approach. It starts with a requirements layer that captures functional and non‑functional specifications, proceeds to a functional architecture layer expressed in SysML activity or sequence diagrams, then to a logical architecture layer defined through SysML block definition and internal block diagrams or through architecture description languages such as ACME or MontiArc. Finally, the product/technical layer is represented by executable simulation models in MathWorks Simulink or by source code in C++/Java. Transition between stages is governed by traceability relationships that map requirements to architecture elements and to code artifacts, ensuring consistent model evolution. Lifecycle governance is achieved through iterative refinement, review, and validation against the defined model standards."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system references several industry standards and specifications: SysML (OMG) for model‑based engineering, ACME (OMG) for component‑and‑connector descriptions, AADL (ASHRAE) for systems architecture, and MontiArc for component‑based modelling. No explicit certification requirements, compliance frameworks, or interoperability standards are mentioned beyond these modeling standards."
]
